preferred_name: Light block of the control circuit device

preferred_name_ml.en: Light block of the control circuit device
preferred_name_ml.fr: bloc lumineux de l'appareil pour circuit de commande
preferred_name_ml.zh: 控制电路电器的灯模块

definition: part which contains and support the lamp, fixed on an enclosure or on the body of the control push-button

definition_ml.en: part which contains and support the lamp, fixed on an enclosure or on the body of the control push-button
definition_ml.fr: partie qui contient et supporte la lampe, montée sur le boîtier ou le corps du bouton-poussoir de commande
definition_ml.de: Teil, der die Lampe enthält und unterstützt, angebracht auf der Kapselung oder dem Gehäuse des Drucktasters
definition_ml.zh: 包含和支撑灯的电器的部件，固定在外壳上或按钮本体上。
